$comment: Keyword fixtures for scripts/e2e-claude-keyword.sh (Plan-Phase 6 §6.6). Each entry pairs a user prompt that should trigger the model to call hotskills.search with a query, and a list of must-include skill IDs the search must surface. The names are intentionally vercel-labs/agent-skills entries so they are guaranteed to exist on skills.sh. Rank-jitter is tolerated.

fixtures.prompt: Review my React components for performance and accessibility issues
How should I structure routes in a Next.js app router project?
Explain the right way to type a generic React hook in TypeScript
Help me apply Tailwind utility classes consistently across my landing page
Wire up a shadcn/ui Dialog with Radix primitives
